nasb.text: On the twenty-fourth day of the first month, while I was by the bank of the great river, that is, the Tigris,

esv.text: On the twenty-fourth day of the first month, as I was standing on the bank of the great river (that is, the Tigris)

cnv.text: 正月二十四日，我在底格里斯大河邊的時候，

ccb.text: 一月二十四日，我站在底格里斯河边，
